title: Retail ERP Rollout
background: A retailer is preparing to replace several legacy finance and inventory systems with a new ERP.
candidate_prompt: How would you evaluate the situation and recommend what the organization should do next?
good_answer_includes: Clarifies business processes and implementation goals
Assesses scope, data, integrations, and user impacts
Identifies risks in timeline, adoption, and testing
great_answer_includes: Prioritizes data migration and change management
interviewer_notes: A strong candidate should use a clear erp implementation structure, isolate the most important drivers, and connect the recommendation to business impact.
